title: Double-Tier Macrame Wall Shelf
excerpt: Maximize your wall space with this stylish two-tiered macrame shelf unit.

steps.title: Prepare materials
steps.description: Sand both boards, drill corner holes, and optionally stain to match.

steps.title: Mount on dowel
steps.description: Attach 8 long cords to the dowel using lark's head knots.

steps.title: Create first tier
steps.description: Add decorative knotting, then thread cords through the first shelf and secure.

steps.title: Add second tier
steps.description: Continue the pattern, add the second shelf, and finish with decorative elements.

tips: Space shelves 25-30cm apart for versatile storage
Ensure wall mounting is into studs for heavier items
